summary: Tested email notification system (5-stage notifications with Review & Send workflow). Backend API tests: 13/13 passed. Frontend UI tests: All passed (Email Notifications section visible, Review button triggers preview modal, Send button enabled).

minor.issue: Resend API with free tier default sender (onboarding@resend.dev) can only send to account owner email. Returns 500 with descriptive error.
minor.note: This is a Resend limitation, not a code bug. Domain verification required for production use.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/notifications/status - returns available notifications based on job status
Backend: GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/notifications/preview/{notification_type} - returns email preview with HTML body, subject, recipient
Backend: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/notifications/send/{notification_type} - sends email via Resend (fails with expected Resend limitation)
Backend: can_send returns true when Resend API key is configured
Backend: All 5 notification types preview correctly (stones_accepted, verbal_uploaded, stones_returned, cert_uploaded, cert_returned)
Frontend: Email Notifications section visible in job detail modal for admin users
Frontend: Stones Received notification available for stones_accepted status job
Frontend: Review button triggers preview modal
Frontend: Email preview modal displays: To, Subject, Email Preview with HTML content
Frontend: Send Email button is enabled and clickable
Frontend: Cancel button available to close modal
critical_code_review_comments: Resend integration works correctly - the 500 error on send is due to Resend free tier limitation (can only send to account owner email with default sender). Production deployment requires domain verification at resend.com/domains.
seed_data_creation: Used existing Job #7 with stones_accepted status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email notification system fully tested. 3 API endpoints working: /notifications/status, /notifications/preview/{type}, /notifications/send/{type}. Frontend shows Email Notifications section in job modal with Review button that opens preview modal with Send Email button. Resend API key is configured but email sending will fail for non-account-owner recipients due to Resend free tier limitation.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No bugs found. The Resend email send 'failure' is expected behavior due to Resend's free tier restriction requiring domain verification for sending to arbitrary recipients.
